zh.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾凱可維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton於1086年出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton41歲，母親Lady Alice Frome22歲。他於大約1126年與Lady Alice Pichard在英國爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1135年12月1日之前在英國英格蘭爾凱可維其可。

zh-hans.Keckwick, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾凱可維其可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton于1086年出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton41岁，母亲Lady Alice Frome22岁。他于大约1126年与Lady Alice Pichard在英国爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1135年12月1日之前在英国英格兰爾凱可維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton was born in 1086, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton, was 41 and his mother, Lady Alice Frome, was 22. He married Lady Alice Pichard about 1126, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 1 December 1135, in Keckwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton est né en 1086, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Frome, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Pichard environ 1126, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 1 décembre 1135, à Keckwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton 1086 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton 41 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Frome 22. Er hat um 1126 in Cheshire, England Lady Alice Pichard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor 1. Dezember 1135 in Keckwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton è nato il nel 1086 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Frome, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Pichard circa 1126, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1 dicembre 1135, nel Keckwick, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Duttonが1086年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Odard Dutton 1st Lord Duttonは41歳，母Lady Alice Fromeは22歳であった。約1126年にイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Alice Pichardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1135年12月1日以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアケックウィックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton(이)가 1086년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Frome(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1126년 영국 체실르에서 Lady Alice Pichard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1135년 12월 1일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 케ck윅에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton nasceu em 1086, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Frome, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Pichard aproximadamente 1126, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1 de dezembro de 1135, em Keckwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton родился в 1086 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Frome, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Pichard около 1126 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 1 декабрь 1135 г. в местности кекквикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh FitzOdard 2nd Lord of Dutton nació en 1086, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Odard Dutton 1st Lord Dutton, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Frome, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Pichard aproximadamente 1126, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de 1 de diciembre de 1135, en Keckwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
